title: Text Block Section
description: Base New Canvas text section container with paragraph styling.
previewHtml:
This whole section (within the top blue border and below grey border) is a <section> tag with a class name of text-block. This will likely be one of the most common UI components.

This is sentence within a <paragraph> tag.
keywords: new canvas text block section paragraph container

title: Heading 2
description: Heading level 2 styling inside a New Canvas text block.
previewHtml:
This is a Heading 2 or <h2> tag

Use this as the primary heading inside the section.
keywords: new canvas heading h2 text block section title

title: Information Callout Box
description: Informational callout box for definitions, reminders, and key takeaways.
previewHtml:
Information

Use this type of call-out box for informational instances, such as "definitions" and "key takeaways."
keywords: new canvas callout box information tag takeaway definition

title: Action Callout Box
description: Action-oriented callout box for prompts, reflections, and learner tasks.
previewHtml:
action

Use this type of call-out box for instances where you want the learner to take an action, such as "reflections."
snippetHtml:
Tag label

Put content here
keywords: new canvas callout box action reflection prompt tag

title: Highlight Callout Box
description: High-visibility callout box for future warning or emphasis use cases.
previewHtml:
highlight

This type of call-out box is for future use, anticipating situations where we need to warn learners or otherwise be brightly colorful.
snippetHtml:
Tag label

Put content here
keywords: new canvas callout box highlight warning emphasis tag

title: Video Block
description: Standard lecture block using the New Canvas video block treatment.
previewHtml:
Lecture

This is a Heading 2 or <h2> tag

This is a <section> tag with 2 class names of text-block and video-block. This will likely be one of the most common UI components.
keywords: new canvas video block lecture tag text block

title: Guest Lecture Video Block
description: Highlighted video block variant for guest lecture content.
previewHtml:
Guest lecture

This is a Heading 2 or <h2> tag

This is a <section> tag with 3 class names of text-block, video-block, and highlight. This will likely be one of the most common UI components.
snippetHtml:
Guest lecture

Heading 2

Paragraph text
keywords: new canvas video block guest lecture highlight

title: Blue Video Block
description: Blue-tag video block variant for alternate video labeling.
previewHtml:
Tag label

This is a Heading 2 or <h2> tag

This is a <section> tag with 3 class names of text-block, video-block, and blue. This will likely be one of the most common UI components.
snippetHtml:
Tag label

Heading 2

Paragraph text
keywords: new canvas video block blue tag
